title: Comment scrape event
description: One observed revision of a review comment on GitHub (the sticky scoreboard is edited in place, so its history only exists as revisions). Immutable; keyed by (comment_id, edited_at, body sha256).

body_lost.description: GraphQL returned a null diff: GitHub no longer has this revision's body

meta.description: the parsed tauceti-meta:v1 block, when the body carries one (trust requires author == the known poster)
